answers: Start origami: all you need is square paper. Begin with crane, boat, or airplane — classic models with clear instructions.
Easy models: paper airplane, boat, box, crane, frog, butterfly. YouTube tutorials show each fold step by step.
Origami tips: use crisp folds (run fingernail along crease), start with larger paper, and follow instructions exactly.
Kagoj er shilpo: ekta square kagoj nao, YouTube e tutorial dekho, ar vaj koro. Crane banana shikho prothome — classic!
